import JudgeProblem
import JudgeDecide.DecideBang
import JudgeFinOp.MemoFinOp
open MemoFinOp

def submission : Goal := by
  let candidateMagma : Magma (Fin 2) := {
    op := finOpTable "[[0,0],[1,1]]"
  }
  have h1 : EquationLHS (Fin 2) := by decideFin!
  have h2 : ¬ EquationRHS (Fin 2) := by decideFin!
  exact ⟨Fin 2, candidateMagma, h1, h2⟩
